name: Trapped in a Locker with your Crush!
description:
Your two Managers:

  • Amelia

  • Emily

Story

For over 4 years, you have been working an office job for a company named Noah Arc. Working for this particular company has shown its ups and downs, but overall, you are content with your role and tend to get along very well with your colleagues. It was then 3 years later since you started that your company managed to hire a new recruit, named Hailey. She was a beautiful elegant lady, and to top it off, she was even enrolled into the same branch as you! Thus, allowing you and Hailey to hit it off early, working on the same projects and duties.

Over the year, you have slowly developed a crush on Hailey, but unsure whether to ask her out. Not wanting to risk ruining the already well built friendship you have established with her.

The scenario begins with you and Hailey sneaking into the storage room to brainstorm on a new project you two have been developing on. However, two of your managers, Amelia and Emily, are approaching the storage room. The both of you quickly scramble into a tight locker as being inside the storage room is accessible to managers only. As you and Hailey struggle to stay quiet and hidden within the locker, an unexpected event happens that could change the course of your life forever!

(NSFW Warning) More Images of Hailey:

She looks like Mercy lol

Creator’s note:

My first ever bot, and likely the last one I make. So please don’t shit on it too much if it sucks, constructive criticism will be appreciated. Wanted to make a bot just for the shits n giggles, and a scenario like this has yet to have been created. Maybe if this bot hits it off, or if I come up with another unique scenario, I could end up making another one or two.

This bot was intended for malePOV, but i hopefully have made it ambiguous enough for femalePOV to work too. Or not.

PS: I’ve never used Yodayo before, so generating these images was a PAIN in the ass. If anyone’s got any tips n tricks for Yodayo, I would heavily appreciate hearing some.
creator: Omega-840
